summary: Testing completed for CreatorStudio AI backend refactoring and AI-powered Creator Pro tools. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) FormData Content-Type header issue in api.js, (2) Error handling for FastAPI validation errors in CreatorProTools.js. All AI features working with aiPowered: true.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed FormData Content-Type header issue - axios was sending application/json instead of multipart/form-data
Fixed error handling in CreatorProTools.js - FastAPI validation errors (422) were being rendered as React children
All Creator Pro AI tools (bio-generator, hook-analyzer, caption-generator) return aiPowered: true
TwinFinder dashboard and celebrities endpoints working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, AI generation working

seed_data_creation: Demo and admin users seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete (279 lines). AI integration using Gemini 3 Flash via emergentintegrations library is working. Fixed FormData issue in api.js and error handling in CreatorProTools.js. All Creator Pro tools now display AI-generated results correctly.

backend_health./api/health/: PASS - Returns healthy status with version 2.0.0

creator_pro_ai_tools.POST /api/creator-pro/hook-analyzer: PASS - AI-powered hook analysis with improvements (aiPowered: true)

twinfinder.GET /api/twinfinder/dashboard: PASS - Returns credits, costs, celebrities count

frontend_pages.Login: PASS - Form works, redirects to dashboard
frontend_pages.Dashboard: PASS - Shows user name, credits, generations
frontend_pages.TwinFinder (/app/twinfinder): PASS - Upload area, consent checkbox, AI analysis button visible
frontend_pages.Creator Pro (/app/creator-pro): PASS - All 12 tools visible, Bio Generator AI generation working

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: FormData requests were failing with 422 because axios was sending Content-Type: application/json instead of multipart/form-data
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added interceptor to remove Content-Type header when data is FormData, allowing browser to set correct boundary

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: FastAPI validation errors (422) with detail array were being passed directly to toast.error(), causing React 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added getErrorMessage helper function to properly extract error messages from FastAPI validation error responses
